title: Profile
description: Personal profile information for Riku Lauttia

personal.name: Riku Lauttia
personal.intro: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, software, product development, and business.
personal.description: Riku Lauttia works at the intersection of AI engineering, software engineering, commercial strategy, and product development.

about: Riku Lauttia is focused on building intelligent systems that shape the future of technology and business. He works at the intersection of AI engineering, commercial strategy, and product development.
With a background in business, software engineering, and applied AI, Riku combines deep technical expertise with strong commercial acumen.

education.field: Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence

education.thesis: The Role of Artificial Intelligence in Analyzing Large Datasets and Its Utilization in Commercial Decision-Making
